patch.value: pm create --type <invalid> rejection message suggests 'pm schema add-type ... (writes .agents/pm/schema/types.json)' with a HARDCODED path, ignoring the active --pm-path. pm schema remove-type already reports the real configured path. Fix: thread the resolved pmRoot into the invalid-type error builder so the hint reflects the actual tracker path (and omits stale .agents/pm when a custom path is active).
GH-253: invalid --type create error hardcodes .agents/pm path, ignoring active --pm-path

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: Fixed: invalid --type create/update/config errors now thread the resolved schema/types.json path via new resolveItemTypesFilePath(pmRoot, schema) (runtime-schema.ts), so the hint reflects the active --pm-path instead of hardcoded .agents/pm. buildInvalidTypeHint/Error gained an optional typesFilePath param (falls back to .agents/pm default).

patch.value: Added resolveItemTypesFilePath; threaded resolved schema/types.json path into buildInvalidTypeError across create/update/config.
Hint points at the configured tracker's schema/types.json.
Fixed: invalid --type error hint now reflects the active --pm-path.
